description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a classic paneled design, featuring two vertically elongated doors on the front. The doors have decorative molding and are divided into upper and lower sections, with the upper panels being solid and the lower panels appearing darker, possibly glass or painted wood. Two small round knobs are centrally placed for opening the doors. The sides and back of the wardrobe are plain and unadorned, with a smooth, light-colored finish. The top of the wardrobe is slightly overhanging, adding a subtle decorative touch, and the base is flat and sturdy, suitable for placement on flat surfaces.
description: A tall, classic paneled wardrobe with two front doors, decorative molding, and small round knobs, finished in a light color with contrasting lower panels.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain, flat surface with no visible features or decorations.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a smooth, unadorned panel with a slight overhang at the top.
description_view_2: The front view displays two paneled doors with decorative molding, contrasting lower panels, and two small round knobs.
description_view_3: The right side view is identical to the left, showing a plain, smooth panel with a slight top overhang.
